race.comment: AGENT ZERO (6) just missed behind subsequent Group winner Snitzel Dancer at Hawkesbury three back as favourite before tackling G3 grade his past couple. Back to the mile now and right back in grade. This looks a very favourable scenario for him and he rates highly on his recent form. KINDAMAGIC (8) sat handy and was very good on resumption at Sale. She's showing plenty of promise and getting out to the mile second-up won't be an issue. Should sit close to the speed for McDougall and with improvement likely, she can repeat the dose. HAMMOON HEROINE (7) was too good from the front when a $1.60 favourite at Kembla first-up. She can take up the running from a good draw yet again and with natural progression, she'll be very hard to gun down. ZIPPY LION (13) is better than he showed last time out and won't be far away. HAMMETT (2) can improve sharply today.
